message:
🐛 Fix RefreshToken panic on short Authorization headers (#2555)

* 🐛 Fix RefreshToken panic on short Authorization headers

Add length guard before slicing Authorization header to prevent
slice bounds panic when header is shorter than 'Bearer ' prefix.
Extract magic number 7 to named constant bearerPrefixLen for clarity.
Apply same fix to Logout handler for consistency.
Add test cases for short and non-Bearer Authorization headers.

Fixes #2545

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix Dockerfile Go version to match go.mod 1.25.0

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -109,6 +109,20 @@ func TestRefreshToken(t *testing.T) {
 		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusUnauthorized, resp.StatusCode)
 	})
 
+	t.Run("Short Authorization Header (< Bearer prefix length)", func(t *testing.T) {
+		req, _ := http.NewRequest("POST", "/auth/refresh", nil)
+		req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bad")
+		resp, _ := app.Test(req, 5000)
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusUnauthorized, resp.StatusCode)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("Authorization Header without Bearer prefix", func(t *testing.T) {
+		req, _ := http.NewRequest("POST", "/auth/refresh", nil)
+		req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Basic dXNlcjpwYXNz")
+		resp, _ := app.Test(req, 5000)
+		assert.Equal(t, http.StatusUnauthorized, resp.StatusCode)
+	})
+
 	t.Run("Invalid Token", func(t *testing.T) {
 		req, _ := http.NewRequest("POST", "/auth/refresh", nil)
 		req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer invalid-token-string")
